The individual who has written more than 100 books is Avram Noam Chomsky. 

This is based on the context provided, which states that Noam Chomsky is the author of over 100 books on topics such as linguistics, war, politics, and mass media. Yaşar Kemal, on the other hand, is mentioned as having written several novels, including "Teneke" and "Memed, My Hawk," but not as a writer of over 100 books.
